review_text: The website kept crashing during checkout and I was charged twice.
Support took forever to reply and never answered my question.
The staff was rude and the store was messy.
The app is confusing and it took too many steps to complete a simple task.
I was billed twice and the refund process was unclear.
Delivery was late and no one updated me about the delay.
My order arrived with the wrong item and one product was missing.
Good products overall but the search feature is hard to use.
Customer service was dismissive and unhelpful when I asked for help.
The dashboard was slow and timed out several times while I was working.
The setup instructions were unclear and the workflow felt complicated.
The pricing was not explained clearly and I felt misled.
My package never arrived and support kept sending generic replies.
The location was dirty and several shelves were empty.
The app logged me out during payment and my coupon disappeared.
The technician was polite but arrived much later than scheduled.
The product stopped working after two days and felt cheaply made.
I had to explain the issue three times and still got no resolution.
The portal kept freezing and I could not submit my assignment.
Helpful advisor, but booking an appointment was confusing.
Unexpected fees showed up and no one explained what they were for.
Pickup was missed completely and no one contacted me.
The site works, but the scheduling flow is harder than it should be.
The agent was short with me and did not seem to care.
Great experience overall and the staff was very helpful.
